# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-application
description: A Helm chart for Kubernetes
version: 0.1.0

sources:
  - https://example.com

dependencies: []

maintainers:
  - name: Your Name
    email: yourname@example.com

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-application
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-application
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-application
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-application
          image: my-application-image:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-application
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 80
  selector:
    app: my-application

---

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: my-application
spec:
  rules:
    - host: "*"
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: my-application
                port:
                  number: 80

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: my-application-config
data:
  example.property: "value"

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: my-application-secret
type: Opaque
data:
  example.secret: "dmFsdWU="
